title: Shared Methods Catalogue + Soft-Reminder Hook
scope:
Establish a persistent home, naming convention, and discoverability surface for shared methods — logic re-used across more than one call surface (Frontend React ↔ BFF Route Handler ↔ Public Go API).

Three deliverables:

  1. Directory contract — app/lib/shared/<domain>/ (TS, cross-runtime: browser bundle + Next.js Node route handler), backend/internal/shared/<domain>/ (Go), dev/fixtures/shared/<domain>/ (parity golden fixtures).
  2. docs/c_shared_methods.md catalogue — single index of every shared method with domain, TS path, Go path, fixtures path, consumers, status (stable / evolving / experimental).
  3. Soft-reminder hook — .claude/hooks/shared-methods-reminder.sh firing on Write/Edit against app/api/**/route.ts or backend/internal/**/handler.go emitting a one-line nudge to check the catalogue.

Out of scope: retrofitting historical shared methods (separate audit). This plan establishes the substrate + first entry (PLA-0044's topology walker).
value:
PLA-0044 is the first time the project deliberately writes one method that runs in three places (React browser, Next.js Node BFF, Go public API). Without a catalogue the second occurrence drifts: someone writes a parallel utility, fixtures get skipped, the PLA-0039 lint trio catches the symptom not the cause.

The catalogue exists so the third occurrence finds the pattern and the fourth extends it. Future PRs adding a new route.ts or Go handler get a chat-time nudge to consider shared placement before duplicating. Reviewers have one file to scan to know whether a primitive already exists. Memory has one rule pointing at one doc.
implementation_plan: Create directories app/lib/shared/, backend/internal/shared/, dev/fixtures/shared/ with .gitkeep so paths exist before PLA-0044 lands.
Write docs/c_shared_methods.md catalogue with table format + first row (PLA-0044 topology walker) — already shipped during planning.
Add CLAUDE.md pointer under Working practices to the catalogue — already shipped.
Write .claude/hooks/shared-methods-reminder.sh with POSIX regex matchers on route.ts + handler.go — already shipped.
Wire hook in .claude/settings.json PostToolUse array — already shipped.
Write .claude/memory/feedback_shared_methods_home.md + MEMORY.md index line — already shipped.
Seed dev/registries/shared_methods.json lint allow-list so lint:writer-boundary and lint:transport-segregation recognise app/lib/shared/** as cross-import-safe.
Verify all shipped items end-to-end (acceptance criteria 1-6) and update Vector_Scope.md + scope-refs.map for catalogue keywords.
areas_impacted: API: soft-reminder hook on new app/api/**/route.ts and backend/internal/**/handler.go.
GOV: lint allow-list seed dev/registries/shared_methods.json for cross-import safety.
feature_list: docs/c_shared_methods.md catalogue with table format + first row (PLA-0044 topology walker).
.claude/CLAUDE.md pointer to docs/c_shared_methods.md under Working practices.
.claude/hooks/shared-methods-reminder.sh Edit/Write matcher on new handler routes.
features_extended: CLAUDE.md Working practices index — gains one line for docs/c_shared_methods.md.
MEMORY.md index — gains one line for feedback_shared_methods_home.md.
lint:writer-boundary + lint:transport-segregation — allow-list seed exempts app/lib/shared/** from cross-import bans.

work_item_backlog.title: Establish app/lib/shared/, backend/internal/shared/, dev/fixtures/shared/ directories with .gitkeep scaffolds
work_item_backlog.notes: EST-F1 RISK-LOW FE-DEV-0026. Creates three .gitkeep files so the substrate exists before PLA-0044's walker lands.

work_item_backlog.title: Seed dev/registries/shared_methods.json lint allow-list
work_item_backlog.notes: EST-F2 RISK-LOW FE-DEV-0027. JSON allow-list permitting app/lib/shared/** to be cross-imported from app/components/** and app/api/**/route.ts; consumed by lint:writer-boundary + lint:transport-segregation.

work_item_backlog.title: Verify PLA-0045 shipped substrate end-to-end (catalogue, hook, memory, CLAUDE.md pointer)
work_item_backlog.notes: EST-F2 RISK-LOW FE-DEV-0028. Runs the 6 acceptance proofs against the items already shipped during planning: catalogue exists with walker row, CLAUDE.md links to it, hook fires on new route.ts and stays quiet on other files, memory loads at session start.

work_item_backlog.title: Update Vector_Scope.md + .claude/scope-refs.map for PLA-0045 catalogue keywords
work_item_backlog.notes: EST-F1 RISK-LOW FE-DEV-0029. Adds scope items for shared-methods catalogue under DEV; registers keywords in scope-refs.map so future commits annotating shared methods land on the right scope row.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: The three shared directories exist on disk with .gitkeep
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: ls app/lib/shared/.gitkeep backend/internal/shared/.gitkeep dev/fixtures/shared/.gitkeep returns all three paths
grep 'app/lib/shared' dev/registries/shared_methods.json returns the entry; lint:writer-boundary + lint:transport-segregation pass when a component imports from app/lib/shared/topology/walker

acceptance_criteria.criterion: docs/c_shared_methods.md exists and lists topology walker as row 1
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: grep -l 'topology walker' docs/c_shared_methods.md finds the file

acceptance_criteria.criterion: CLAUDE.md links to the catalogue under Working practices
Editing a new app/api/foo/route.ts triggers the soft-reminder hook with one-line shared reminder
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: manual test: create throwaway app/api/_test_shared/route.ts; hook fires in additionalContext containing 'shared'; delete test file after

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Editing an unrelated file (e.g. app/components/X.tsx) does NOT trigger the hook
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: same manual test against a component file → no hook output

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Memory rule is loaded at session start
Vector_Scope.md carries a row for shared-methods catalogue under DEV and scope-refs.map registers the keywords
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: grep 'shared methods' Vector_Scope.md returns the row; grep 'shared methods catalogue' .claude/scope-refs.map returns the keyword line

risks.risk: Hook becomes noisy (fires on every route edit, not just new ones)
risks.mitigation: Matcher uses Write (new files) primarily; Edit only fires if changed file is <100 lines (proxy for new-ish). Hook output is one line — easy to ignore.
Memory rule + librarian sweep on docs/c_shared_methods.md mtime monthly.

risks.risk: Lint allow-list creates cross-import escape hatch abused by callers
risks.mitigation: app/lib/shared/** files are explicitly cross-runtime (no React, no Node-only API); CI lint enforces.

risks.risk: Hook bash script breaks on macOS vs Linux regex
risks.mitigation: Use POSIX grep -E only, no sed -E, no [[ =~ ]].
